# openai_organization_users (Data Source)

List organization users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_organization_users" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `users` (Attributes List) Organization users returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `added_at` (Number) added at
- `api_key_last_used_at` (Number) api key last used at
- `created` (Number) created
- `developer_persona` (String) developer persona
- `email` (String) email
- `id` (String) id
- `is_default` (Boolean) is default
- `is_scale_tier_authorized_purchaser` (Boolean) is scale tier authorized purchaser
- `is_scim_managed` (Boolean) is scim managed
- `is_service_account` (Boolean) is service account
- `name` (String) name
- `role` (String) role
- `technical_level` (String) technical level
